channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dead Fox on footpath, looks like it’s been hit by a car, 23rd May
item.description:
Dead fox on the footpath of Main Road, Sidcup next to junction with Alder Road, looks like it’s been hit by a car poor thing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 180, Main Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pile of clothes and a few bin bags left outside of my windows, 23rd May
item.description:
This is a recurring issue. Extra large amount of trash is being left under our windows causing bad smell, pest risk and distress. This week it’s a pile of clothes and bin bags. Our outside black general trash bin is constantly being filled in as well.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wilberforce Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gardening waste littering street, 22nd May
item.description:
Gardening waste littering street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Combermere Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, it's been 3 days!, 22nd May
item.description:
Street still not working, has been that way since Wednesday. I see that it has been reported but clearly not fixed. I did not report the original problem but now........3 days! and a Bank Holiday weekend. Come on Greenwich, pull your finger out.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 22nd May
item.description:
Previously repaired pothole failing. High risk of danger to motorcyclists. Included Google and Apple maps images for reference. The hole is worse than it was 2 months ago when it was last captured by Google. Hope this helps.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M25, Waltham Abbey, Epping Forest
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti sprayed on private property, 22nd May
item.description:
Graffiti sprayed on private property, we are the freeholders of the building and would like the tag to be removed please. It probably was done either today or within the last couple of days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rotherhithe New Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass all over the pavement, 22nd May
item.description:
There’s broken glass all over the pavement it could be dangerous to people or animals walking over it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Tulse Hill, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown foliage, 22nd May
item.description:
This is a consistent problem that has been going on for months. The property next to the bins has foliage which is always extremely overgrown. It interfers with front access to the enclosed bins. It is the same at the rear. A few of the ground floor properties that face Cooks Road, when you walk through to the rear of the block, foliage is vastly overgrown which affects access to the path.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cook's Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Just next to the pond, 22nd May
item.description:
The light has gone out
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 80-90, South Hill Park, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rat sightings, 22nd May
item.description:
I am concerned that we have spotted rats numerous times in the last few weeks in Bexley Woods which we walk through on the school run. One was also spotted in a friend's garden who lives on Penhill Rd. We have lived here for 4 years & never seen rats in the woods. It's a very popular spot for children & animals so this is alarming.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 68, Bridgen Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ivy growing on the wall is blocking access to part of the pavement and making it difficult to walk, 22nd May
item.description:
The ivy is out of control and needs cutting back

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Avenue Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mead Way, Hayes, Greater London

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Road, Woolwich

item.title: Fly tipping, 22nd May

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dandridge Close, Greenwich

item.title: Street light mid alligned, 22nd May
item.description:
Street points to the back of my house in the neighbouring steet. Not pointed onto the pavement on llyton Avenue .

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lytton Avenue, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Supermarket trolleys dumped., 22nd May
item.description:
There is now 3 supermarket trolleys at the end on Tilbrook road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ridgebrook Road, Kidbrooke
